title: Dotfiles Environment Manifest v1
description: Portable workstation-environment manifest emitted by `dot env emit`. The canonical 'what is installed on this machine + at what version + from which source' record. Designed to feed downstream tooling: CycloneDX SBOM aggregators, AgentSpec/AAIF agent runtimes, EU CRA compliance reports.

schema_version.description: URL of the schema this manifest conforms to. Must equal $id of this file.

manifest_version.description: Semantic version of the manifest payload itself, independent of the schema URL.

emitted_at.description: RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the manifest was produced.

name.description: Tool name that produced the manifest (e.g. 'dot env emit').

hostname.description: Result of `uname -n`. May be 'unknown' in headless / containerised contexts.

os.description: Result of `uname -s` — Darwin, Linux, MINGW64_NT-*, etc.

arch.description: Result of `uname -m` — x86_64, arm64, aarch64, etc.

tools.description: Flattened list of all tool installations mise sees on this host. Multiple records per tool are allowed when multiple versions are installed.

name.description: Tool identifier as mise knows it (e.g. 'node', 'aqua:charmbracelet/gum', 'npm:@anthropic-ai/claude-code').

version.description: Installed version. null when the install record is incomplete.

source.description: Absolute path of the config file that requested this tool. The literal string 'orphan' for installs not referenced by any active config.

requested_version.description: Version spec the config requested (e.g. '24.14.0', 'latest', '3.12'). null for orphans.

install_path.description: Absolute path of the install directory under mise's data root.

active.description: True iff this version is the one shimmed/active for the current path.
